description: eBay CLI — seller tools, marketplace categories, and account management

login.help: Configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to save credentials to

logout.help: Clear stored credentials and browser sessions.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to clear credentials from

create.help: Create a new profile from .env.example template.

delete.help: Delete a profile and its data.

get.help: Get details for a specific profile.

list.help: List all profiles and show which is the default.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of profiles to return

select.help: Activate a profile within its auth type.

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to activate within its auth type

refresh.help: Refresh OAuth access token using stored refresh token.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to check (defaults to all profiles)

test.help: Test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles.

clear.help: Remove all cached responses. Deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.

categories.help: Search and browse eBay marketplace categories

conditions.help: List valid item conditions for a category. Uses the eBay Metadata API to retrieve which condition values are accepted when listing items in the specified category.

arguments.name: category_id
arguments.help: Category ID to get valid conditions for

options.name: --marketplace
options.help: eBay marketplace ID (EBAY_US, EBAY_GB, EBAY_AU, etc.)

get.help: Get details for a specific category ID. Returns category details including the full path and whether it's a leaf category. Use --aspects to see required and recommended item specifics for listings.

arguments.name: category_id
arguments.help: Category ID to get details for

options.name: --marketplace
options.help: eBay marketplace ID (EBAY_US, EBAY_GB, EBAY_AU, etc.)

list.help: List eBay categories matching a keyword query. Returns leaf category suggestions based on your search query. Use the category ID when creating listings. This is an alias for 'ebay categories search'.

options.name: --marketplace
options.help: eBay marketplace ID (EBAY_US, EBAY_GB, EBAY_AU, etc.)

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of results to display

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include in output (e.g., categoryId,categoryName)

tree.help: Browse the category tree from a parent category. Shows child categories of the specified parent. Use this to drill down into the category hierarchy to find the right leaf category for your item.

arguments.name: category_id
arguments.help: Parent category ID to browse (omit for root-level categories)

options.name: --marketplace
options.help: eBay marketplace ID (EBAY_US, EBAY_GB, EBAY_AU, etc.)

options.name: --depth
options.help: How many levels deep to show (1-3)

options.name: --flat
options.help: Flatten hierarchy into a single list

search.help: Search eBay completed/sold listings. Searches eBay marketplace for completed listings using browser automation. Returns sold and unsold completed listings by default. Use --sold to filter to only sold items.

options.name: --sold
options.help: Only show sold items (default: all completed)

options.name: --condition
options.help: Item condition (new, open_box, refurbished, used, for_parts, or eBay condition ID)

seller.help: Seller tools — listings, orders, inventory, policies, and more

get.help: Get details for a seller command group.
Get fresh image metadata from eBay API. Fetches current imageUrl and expirationDate from eBay. If the image exists in local storage, updates the stored metadata.

list.help: List all locally-stored uploaded images. Shows images stored in ~/.ebay/images.json from previous uploads. Available fields: image_id, imageUrl, expirationDate, source, original, uploaded_at

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of results to return

options.name: --filter
options.help: Filter (field:op:value). Operators: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, in, nin, like, ilike, null, notnull

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include

upload.help: Upload images to eBay for use in listings. Images are hosted on eBay's servers and expire after 30 days if not used in a listing. Upload results are stored locally in ~/.ebay/images.json. Use --file for local files or --url for external URLs (cannot mix). Multiple images can be uploaded by comma-separating paths or URLs.

options.name: --file
options.help: Local file path(s) to upload (comma-separated for multiple)

options.name: --url
options.help: External image URL(s) to upload (comma-separated for multiple)

create.help: Create or update an inventory item. Use --from-json to provide a complete payload for advanced use cases. CLI flags override values from --from-json.

arguments.name: sku
arguments.help: The SKU for the inventory item (must be unique)

options.name: --condition
options.help: Item condition: NEW, LIKE_NEW, NEW_OTHER, NEW_WITH_DEFECTS, MANUFACTURER_REFURBISHED, CERTIFIED_REFURBISHED, EXCELLENT_REFURBISHED, VERY_GOOD_REFURBISHED, GOOD_REFURBISHED, SELLER_REFURBISHED, USED_EXCELLENT, USED_VERY_GOOD, USED_GOOD, USED_ACCEPTABLE, FOR_PARTS_OR_NOT_WORKING

options.name: --from-json
options.help: Path to JSON file containing full inventory item payload

delete.help: Delete an inventory item. Note: You cannot delete an inventory item that has active offers. Delete or end the offers first.

arguments.name: sku
arguments.help: The SKU of the inventory item to delete

get.help: Get details for a specific inventory item.

arguments.name: sku
arguments.help: The SKU of the inventory item

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of items to return (max 200)

options.name: --filter
options.help: Filter (field:op:value). Operators: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, in, nin, like, ilike, null, notnull

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include in output

update.help: Update an existing inventory item. Fetches the current item and merges with provided updates.

arguments.name: sku
arguments.help: The SKU of the inventory item to update

options.name: --images
options.help: New comma-separated list of image URLs

options.name: --aspects
options.help: New item specifics as JSON object

options.name: --from-json
options.help: Path to JSON file containing full inventory item payload

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of groups to return

create.help: Create a new listing. Without --publish: Creates a pseudo-draft using a template. The listing is published briefly at $99,999 then immediately ended, making it visible in eBay Seller Hub for editing. Only --template is required. With --publish: Creates an active listing that stays live. Requires all API parameters (price, category, etc.) either from CLI options or template.

options.name: --description-file
options.help: Read description from file (use '-' for stdin)

options.name: --condition-descriptors
options.help: Condition descriptors JSON for trading cards (e.g., '[{"name":"40001","values":["400010"]}]')

options.name: --dimensions
options.help: Package dimensions as LxWxH in inches (e.g., 12x10x8)

options.name: --store-category-id
options.help: eBay store category ID (use 'ebay store categories list' to find IDs)

delete.help: Delete a listing. If the listing is active, it will be withdrawn first. Then the offer is deleted. Optionally keep the inventory item for reuse.

arguments.name: sku
arguments.help: SKU of the listing to delete

options.name: --keep-inventory
options.help: Keep inventory item, only delete offer

get.help: Get details for a specific listing by SKU.

list.help: List all eBay listings (active and drafts). Combines data from eBay's Inventory API (offers) and Trading API (active listings) into a unified view.

options.name: --status
options.help: Filter by status: active, draft, sold, unsold, or all (default: all)

options.name: --filter
options.help: Filter (field:op:value). Operators: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, in, nin, like, ilike, null, notnull

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include

preview.help: Generate a visual preview of a listing before publishing. Opens an HTML preview in your browser showing how the listing will appear.

arguments.name: sku
arguments.help: SKU of the listing to preview

options.name: --output
options.help: Save HTML to file instead of opening browser

publish.help: Publish a draft listing or set final price on a pseudo-draft. For real drafts: Publishes the listing to make it live on eBay. For pseudo-drafts: Use --price to set the final price (required).

arguments.name: sku
arguments.help: SKU of the listing to publish

unpublish.help: Unpublish (withdraw) an active listing back to draft status. The listing can be republished later.

arguments.name: sku
arguments.help: SKU of the listing to unpublish

update.help: Update an existing listing. Updates both the inventory item and offer as needed.

arguments.name: sku
arguments.help: SKU of the listing to update

create.help: Create a new merchant inventory location. The location key is a unique identifier you define. Use it when creating offers to specify where items ship from.

delete.help: Delete a merchant inventory location. Note: You cannot delete a location that is associated with active listings or offers. You must first update those listings to use a different location.

arguments.name: location_key
arguments.help: The merchant location key to delete

disable.help: Disable a merchant location. Disabled locations cannot be used for new listings but existing listings are not affected.

arguments.name: location_key
arguments.help: The merchant location key to disable

arguments.name: location_key
arguments.help: The merchant location key to enable

get.help: Get details for a specific merchant location.

list.help: List all merchant inventory locations. Merchant locations are used to specify where inventory is stored and where items ship from.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of locations to return

options.name: --filter
options.help: Filter (field:op:value). Operators: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, in, nin, like, ilike, null, notnull

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include in output

arguments.name: message_id
arguments.help: Message ID or comma-separated list of IDs (max 10)

list.help: List all eBay messages (inbox + buyer questions).

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of messages to return (max 200)

options.name: --start-date
options.help: Filter messages created after this date (ISO format: 2025-01-01)

options.name: --end-date
options.help: Filter messages created before this date (ISO format: 2025-01-31)

options.name: --filter
options.help: Filter (field:op:value). Operators: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, in, nin, like, ilike, null, notnull

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include in output

options.name: --body-file
options.help: Path to file containing body text, or '-' for stdin

fulfillments.help: Get shipping fulfillments for an order.

get.help: Get details for a specific order.

list.help: List eBay orders with advanced filtering. IMPORTANT: By default, eBay returns orders from the last 90 days only. To see older orders, use a 'created' filter (e.g., --filter "created:gte:2023-01-01"). Pagination: Use --limit (max 200) and --offset to page through results. The output includes 'total_matches' to show how many orders are available. Syntax: field:operator:value (e.g., total:gt:100) Default operator is 'eq' (e.g., status:FULFILLED) Server-side filters (efficient): - status: NOT_STARTED, IN_PROGRESS, FULFILLED - created: ISO 8601 date (e.g., 2023-01-01) - modified: ISO 8601 date Client-side filters (any field): - total, buyer, payment_status, cancel_status, etc. Logic: - AND: Comma-separated in one flag: --filter "status:FULFILLED,total:gt:100" - OR: Multiple flags: --filter "status:NOT_STARTED" --filter "status:IN_PROGRESS"

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of orders to return (max 200)

options.name: --status
options.help: Filter by fulfillment status: NOT_STARTED, IN_PROGRESS, FULFILLED

options.name: --not-shipped
options.help: Filter for unshipped orders (NOT_STARTED or IN_PROGRESS)

options.name: --order-ids
options.help: Comma-separated list of order IDs to retrieve

options.name: --filter
options.help: Filter (field:op:value). Operators: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, in, nin, like, ilike, null, notnull

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include in output

get.help: Get details for a specific payment policy.

list.help: List all payment policies for a marketplace.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of policies to return

options.name: --filter
options.help: Filter (field:op:value). Operators: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, in, nin, like, ilike, null, notnull

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include in output

create.help: Create a new fulfillment policy. Fulfillment policies define how orders are handled and shipped. The handling time specifies how many business days you need to ship after payment. A shipping carrier, service code, and cost type are required by the eBay API.

options.name: --handling-days
options.help: Handling time in business days (0 = same day)

options.name: --carrier
options.help: Shipping carrier code (e.g., USPS, UPS, FedEx)

options.name: --service
options.help: Shipping service code (e.g., USPSParcel, UPSGround, FedExSmartPost)

options.name: --cost-type
options.help: Shipping cost type: CALCULATED or FLAT_RATE

options.name: --shipping-cost
options.help: Flat-rate shipping cost in USD (e.g., '5.99'). Required when cost-type is FLAT_RATE

delete.help: Delete a fulfillment policy. Note: You cannot delete a policy that is associated with active listings. You must first update those listings to use a different policy.

arguments.name: policy_id
arguments.help: The fulfillment policy ID to delete

get.help: Get details for a specific fulfillment policy.

list.help: List all fulfillment policies for a marketplace. Fulfillment policies define handling time, shipping options, and other fulfillment-related settings for your listings.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of policies to return

options.name: --marketplace
options.help: eBay marketplace ID (e.g., EBAY_US, EBAY_GB, EBAY_DE)

options.name: --filter
options.help: Filter (field:op:value). Operators: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, in, nin, like, ilike, null, notnull

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include in output

update.help: Update an existing fulfillment policy. Only the fields you specify will be updated. The policy is fetched first, then merged with your changes.

arguments.name: policy_id
arguments.help: The fulfillment policy ID to update

options.name: --handling-days
options.help: New handling time in business days

get.help: Get details for a specific return policy.

list.help: List all return policies for a marketplace.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of policies to return

options.name: --filter
options.help: Filter (field:op:value). Operators: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, in, nin, like, ilike, null, notnull

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include in output

create.help: Create and purchase a USPS shipping label for an eBay order. Uses the eBay Logistics API to get shipping quotes and purchase a label. The buyer's address is automatically fetched from the order.

options.name: --weight-unit
options.help: Weight unit: POUND, OUNCE, KILOGRAM, GRAM

options.name: --from-name
options.help: Sender full name (defaults to profile config)

options.name: --from-street
options.help: Sender street address (defaults to profile config)

options.name: --from-state
options.help: Sender state/province code (defaults to profile config)

options.name: --from-zip
options.help: Sender postal code (defaults to profile config)

options.name: --from-country
options.help: Sender country code (defaults to profile config)

options.name: --from-phone
options.help: Sender phone number (defaults to profile config)

options.name: --dry-run
options.help: Only show quotes, do not purchase

options.name: --out
options.help: Output file path for the label PDF

download.help: Download the shipping label PDF for a shipment.

void.help: Void a shipping label and receive a refund.

create.help: Get USPS shipping rate quotes for a package. Returns available rates with pricing and estimated delivery dates. Quotes expire after ~10 minutes. An eBay order ID is required.

options.name: --from-name
options.help: Sender full name (defaults to profile config)

options.name: --from-street
options.help: Sender street address (defaults to profile config)

options.name: --from-state
options.help: Sender state/province code (defaults to profile config)

options.name: --from-zip
options.help: Sender postal code (defaults to profile config)

options.name: --from-country
options.help: Sender country code (defaults to profile config)

options.name: --from-phone
options.help: Sender phone number (defaults to profile config)

options.name: --weight-unit
options.help: Weight unit: POUND, OUNCE, KILOGRAM, GRAM

options.name: --order-id
options.help: eBay order ID (required by Logistics API)

get.help: Get details for a specific store category by ID. Fetches all store categories and returns the one matching the given ID, including its full path in the category hierarchy.

arguments.name: category_id
arguments.help: Store category ID to look up

list.help: List all store categories for the seller's eBay store. Returns the store category hierarchy (up to 3 levels deep). Use --flat to flatten the hierarchy into a single list.

options.name: --flat
options.help: Flatten category hierarchy into a flat list

options.name: --filter
options.help: Filter (field:op:value). Operators: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, in, nin, like, ilike, null, notnull

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include in output

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of categories to return (client-side truncation)

create.help: Create a listing template. Templates can be created from: - CLI options (--category, --price, etc.) - An existing eBay offer (--from-offer) - A JSON file (--from-json)

options.name: --from-offer
options.help: Create template from existing offer ID

get.help: Get a specific template by name.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of templates to return

options.name: --filter
options.help: Filter (field:op:value). Operators: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, in, nin, like, ilike, null, notnull

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include in output

validate.help: Validate a template JSON file against the schema. Checks that the template file is valid JSON and conforms to the template schema before importing.

arguments.name: file_path
arguments.help: Path to JSON template file to validate

whoami.help: Display current user details and scopes.
